patterns.pattern: As you remove the final remnants of the chain-shot from the ship, the sails are once again able to be unfurled.
There is nothing to clear from the riggings.
The crew of your ship is now ready to execute another order.
^= Sl .+Wd .+Cr\/Sp .+$

^(Ship Info for: .+|Ship ID#: .+|Ship alias: .+|Ship type: .+|Ship flag: .+|Ship Vis: .+|Owned by: .+|Captained by: .+|Seaworthiness: .+|Sails health: .+|Hull health: .+|Leaking Now\? .+|Fires: .+|Riggings: .+|Course: .+|Sailing\? .+|Rowing\? .+|In harbour\? .+|Locale: .+|In Ship Arena\? .+|Anchored\? .+|Gangplank: .+|Crewmates: .+|Rope Ladders: .+|Wind from the: .+|Manoeuvres: .+|Diving Bell: .+|Buoy: .+|Cargo Float: .+|Warn of low wages in strongbox: .+|Notify of changes in captaincy: .+)$
^You order your crew to begin repairing the ship's hull\.$
^You order your crew to begin repairing the ship's sails\.$
^Your crew begins to mend your sails and repair your hull\.$
^Your crew starts to mend your sails and repair your hull\.$
^Your crew begins to mend the sails\..*$
^Your crew starts to mend the sails\..*$
^Your crew begins to repair the ship's sails\..*$
^Your crew starts repairing the ship's sails\..*$
^Your crew begins to repair the ship's hull\..*$
^Your crew starts repairing the ship's hull\..*$
^It was already busy repairing your hull\.$
^Your crew ceases all repair activity\.$
^Sail repair continues\. The sails are now at \d+\% health\.$
^Hull repair continues\. The hull is now at \d+\% health\.$
^The sails are now fully repaired!$
^The hull is now fully repaired!$
Burning acid rains down upon the ship
setting fire to all that it touches.
A cool rain suffuses the surroundings.
dissolving the rigging into a snarl
creating a useless tangle
You stride up the lowered boarding plank.
^You board .+\.$
^You climb aboard .+\.$
^You step aboard .+\.$
^You walk up the gangplank and board .+\.$
You disembark the ship via the lowered gangplank.
^You disembark from .+([Ss]hip|[Vv]essel|[Bb]oat|[Tt]rident).*$
^You climb down from .+([Ss]hip|[Vv]essel|[Bb]oat|[Tt]rident).*$
^You step off .+([Ss]hip|[Vv]essel|[Bb]oat|[Tt]rident).*$
^You walk down the gangplank .+\.$
